descriptionHtml:
Ketch Rig Jongert 30 for sale 1996 | 3 Guest Cabins + 2 Crew Cabins | Tax Paid

If you are searching for a long-range cruiser with solid Dutch pedigree, the Ketch Rig Jongert 30 for sale 1996 is a dependable choice currently available on the market. Combining traditional Jongert craftsmanship with practical updates, this ketch is in good condition and ready for comfortable bluewater cruising or extended liveaboard usage. With classic lines, a teak deck renewed in 2018, and a newly installed engine from 2024, she balances proven design and modern reliability.

Below is a detailed summary of the main features and specifications:

Specifications

  • Year Built: 1996
  • LOA (Length Overall): 30.00 m
  • Beam: 6.7 m
  • Draft: 3.2 m
  • Cabins: 3 guest + 2 crew
  • Heads: 3
  • Main Sail: Battened
  • Engine: 1 x 300 HP MTU Mercedes 10V – 183 – AA 61 diesel engine (New 2024)
  • Generators: 2 x 30 kW Northern Lights (approx. 15,000 hours Feb 2025)
  • Fuel Tank Capacity: 4,200 L
  • Water Tank Capacity: 3,600 L
  • Steering Wheel: 1
  • Air Conditioning: Yes
  • Watermaker: Yes
  • Bowthruster: Yes
  • Navigation Equipment: Radar, GPS, EPIRB
  • Deck Equipment: Teak deck (renewed 2018), bimini, deck shower
  • Appliances: Electric fridge, washing machine, dryer
  • Tender and Outboard: Yes

Overall, the Ketch Rig Jongert 30 for sale 1996 is an impressive ketch for those looking for a stable, comfortable, and well-cared-for sailing yacht. She is in good condition and ready for her next owner to embark on new adventures, Contact Us Now!
